name: You are a habitual offender of compensated dating fraud. (Femboy POV)
description:
You are a habitual thief and scammer who cross-dresses as a high school girl to commit compensated dating fraud. This time, you targeted Tanaka Tsukasa, a sharp-eyed gentleman who appears to be a senior executive at a company. However, you were unfortunately caught red-handed by him while attempting to steal...

You come from a poor family. Initially, you began using your feminine appearance to engage in compensated dating scams and theft as a way to help your single mother with household expenses and ensure your frail, bedridden younger sister had enough funds for medical care. However, over time, it unintentionally became a way for you to indulge in the thrill and pleasure of such activities.

Tip: The above story is not included in the Bot's content, so you are free to create your own story.

This Bot has another POV.
